dashboard.error_desc: An error occurred while connecting to the chatbot API system.
dashboard.activity_desc: Chatbot analytics data for the last 30 days
dashboard.tech_analytics_desc: Monitor response latency, cache performance, and API operational costs.
dashboard.business_insights_desc: Track top customer interests, intent distributions, and conversation conversion rates.
dashboard.intent_distribution_desc: Ratio of query topics asked by customers
dashboard.clarification_rate_desc: Measure how complete users' detail inputs are in conversation
dashboard.handoff_desc: Triggered automatically for large groups (> 50 people), complaints, or VAT keywords
dashboard.handoff_detail: The chatbot will automatically disconnect AI responses, show apology notices with Hotline 1900 1800, Zalo chat links, and direct the customer details to the staff dashboard.
dashboard.unknown_intents_desc: Aggregate questions chatbot did not understand to optimize knowledge
dashboard.no_unknown_intents: Excellent! No questions ended up in Unknown Intents.
dashboard.negative_feedbacks_desc: Customer dissatisfaction reports for Sales & Admin quick response

logs.error_desc: A connection error occurred, please refresh the page.
logs.no_logs_desc: Please modify keywords or filters and try again.
logs.feedback_positive: Customer submitted positive feedback 👍 for this response.
logs.feedback_negative_desc: Verify document accuracy or intent routing logic.
logs.rules_tooltip: Adjust routing rules, hardcoded keywords, and consistency checks in backend: config/chat_consistency.php

settings.cache_subtitle: List of queries cached in the chatbot database
settings.clear_all_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all chatbot cache? This will force the chatbot to call the LLM directly for every query.
settings.param_subtitle: Adjust chatbot threshold parameters and status
settings.enable_subtitle: Toggle chatbot responses visible on Client side
settings.limit_desc: Number of times the chatbot asks to clarify missing parameters (e.g. guests count, departure date) before falling back to search (default = 2).
settings.ttl_desc: Number of seconds to store cache (default = 86400 seconds / 24h). Cache entries expire and clear automatically after this.
settings.similarity_desc: Adjust minimum cosine similarity score required to reuse cached responses.
settings.slider_transactional_desc: High similarity score recommended (>= 0.97) to avoid obsolete prices or tour info.
settings.slider_faq_desc: Match general queries, contact info, blogs (0.90 - 0.95 recommended) for higher cache reuse.
